parameters.query: SELECT id, opp_title, agency, level_1, level_2, naics_code, estimated_value FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE (level_2 IS NULL OR level_2 LIKE '%.%' OR level_1 IS NULL OR level_1 = '' OR level_1 = 'Unknown') LIMIT {{ $json.body.limit || 50 }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'classified', count: $input.all().length, message: $input.all().length + ' opportunities classified' }) }}
